subjectCutouts.purpose: Transparent Subject stand-ins for scene preview compositing over user Backdrop. Runtime aspect-ratio reframing uses 16:9 masters.

outputSpec.background: Fully transparent — no studio, floor, or cast shadows

female.wardrobe: Sculpted blouse with collar, sculpted skirt or tailored pants, sculpted flats — unified matte gray hard-surface sculpt

subjectCutouts.appWiring: lib/constants/subject-cutouts.ts → getSubjectCutoutUrl; lib/studio/subject-framing.ts for aspect crop

conventions.purpose: Static preview thumbnails for the Camera, Lighting & Atmosphere panel. Each chip shows a generic visual example of one cinematography concept — not project-specific art.

subject.details: Matte gray male display mannequin with sculpted facial features — defined eye sockets, upper and lower eyelids, brows, nose, lips, and chin. Same mannequin identity across every thumbnail in a section set. Not a female mannequin
subject.facialFeatures: Mannequin face must have clear hard-surface sculpting: visible eyelids with depth beneath the brow, defined nose and mouth forms — not blank smooth eye ovals or featureless face planes
subject.forbidden: No realistic human skin texture, no real people, no anonymous silhouettes, no recognizable celebrity likeness, no live models, no female mannequin, no blank featureless mannequin face, no colored fabric on clothing, no realistic cloth or leather textures

conventions.wardrobe: Sculpted dress shirt with collar and button placket, sculpted chino pants, sculpted belt with visible buckle, sculpted dress shoes — all the same matte gray hard-surface mannequin material as the body and face, one unified gray sculpt throughout. Shirt and pants are smooth hard-surface sculpt with minimal folds only — no fabric wrinkles, no realistic cloth folds, no fabric colors, no cloth texture, no leather texture, no logos or text on clothing. Belt must be visible at waist on medium shot and wider framings.
conventions.standardPose: Neutral standing pose, facing camera, arms relaxed naturally at sides, hands at thigh level — no raised arms, no gestures, no action poses, no clutching pose

environment.palette: Dark desaturated tones compatible with charcoal UI (#242424)
environment.lighting: Soft even studio lighting unless the concept being demonstrated is itself a lighting technique
environment.genre: Generic film-school reference — not genre-specific (no sci-fi, noir, etc.)

composition.medium: Pure photography only — not illustration, not 3D render look, not diagram
composition.focus: Single clear visual demonstration of the named concept; keep background empty unless the concept requires environment

conventions.noText: Zero typography anywhere: no text, letters, words, numbers, captions, subtitles, labels, title cards, watermarks, logos, signage, UI overlays, diagrams with writing, or annotated charts

mannequinIdentity.role: Canonical matte gray male mannequin face, hair, and wardrobe. Pass identityFile as image_paths for any thumbnail that must match this mannequin — especially ECU, CU, MCU, MS, and downstream sections (angles, lighting, movements, atmosphere).
mannequinIdentity.matchReference: Use the exact same matte gray male mannequin identity — same face sculpt, side-parted hair, brow, nose, lips, chin, and smooth sculpted gray dress shirt with belt — from the reference image.
mannequinIdentity.doNotUseAsFramingAnchor: identityFile establishes WHO the mannequin is, not shot framing. Close shots (ECU, CU) still use tight crop prompts; wide shots (LS/WS, ELS) use their own framing rules.
mannequinIdentity.wardrobeSculpt: Shirt and pants are smooth hard-surface gray sculpt — flat matte planes, minimal folds only, no fabric wrinkles, no cloth texture. Belt with visible buckle required on MS and wider framings.

consistency.anchorRole: Mannequin identity reference for shot-types and all mannequin-based sections. Regenerate mannequin-identity.jpg from ms.jpg if MS identity drifts; then re-sync ECU and CU.
consistency.matchReference: Use the exact same matte gray male mannequin identity — same face sculpt, side-parted hair, brow, nose, lips, and sculpted gray dress shirt wardrobe — from the reference image.
consistency.wideShots: LS/WS and ELS require a complete standing full-body mannequin in sculpted gray dress shirt, pants, belt, and shoes — never a bust on the floor. Generate LS/WS without the identity reference; use ls-ws.jpg as reference for ELS.

outputSpec.postProcess: Downscale Grok output to 640x360 before committing

fileLayout.naming: Lowercase abbr; replace slashes with hyphens (LS/WS → ls-ws.jpg)

conventions.promptTemplate: {referenceClause}Pure photographic film-school reference still. {noText}. Matte gray male display mannequin with sculpted facial features, {wardrobe}, {standardPose}. Neutral gray studio, dark desaturated charcoal-friendly palette, cinematic 35mm lens, muted tones. {conceptClause}

shotTypes.inherits: Global conventions (subject, facialFeatures, wardrobe, standardPose, noText, outputSpec, environment, mannequinIdentity)
shotTypes.identityRole: Canonical mannequin face and wardrobe. ECU and CU must reference identityFile to match MCU/MS. MCU and MS were used to establish this identity plate.
shotTypes.matchReference: Use the exact same matte gray male mannequin identity — same face sculpt, side-parted hair, brow, nose, lips, chin, and smooth sculpted gray dress shirt with belt — from the reference image.
shotTypes.framingExceptions: ECU and CU are face-only crops. MS cuts at waistline at belt. MLS / 3/4 shot is thighs up. Cowboy shot matches MLS but extends further down — bottom at mid-thigh. LS/WS is head-to-toe with minimal margin. ELS is figure tiny in vast studio.

angles.inherits: Global conventions (subject, facialFeatures, wardrobe, standardPose, noText, outputSpec, environment)
angles.anchorRole: Generate Eye-Level first. Pass anchorFile as image_paths for every other angle in this section.
angles.matchReference: Use the exact same matte gray male mannequin, wardrobe, pose, and neutral gray studio from the reference image.
angles.framing: Hold medium shot (waist up) constant across the angle set — only camera height, tilt, and perspective change
angles.emphasis: Camera position must read clearly; subject always in standardPose with full wardrobe visible in frame
angles.forbidden: No bust on floor, no raised arms, no horizon tilt unless Dutch angle, no text or diagrams
angles.framingExceptions: Overhead uses top-down view; OTS uses foreground shoulder + distinct second subject; POV uses subjective first-person view
angles.otsSubject: Foreground mannequin: back/shoulder only in sculpted gray dress shirt, soft blur. Facing-camera subject: second distinct matte gray male mannequin (different face sculpt and proportions), same unified gray sculpted wardrobe, standardPose, facing camera

composition.inherits: Global noText, outputSpec, environment palette only — does NOT use mannequin subject or wardrobe
composition.subject: Grayscale primitive geometric solids only — matte volumes (sphere, cylinder, pyramid, rod, cube, incline, cuboid) in varied grays. No people, no mannequins, no color
composition.primitiveVocabulary: Exact set reused in every thumbnail: sphere (medium gray), cylinder (light gray), pyramid (dark gray), rod (light gray, tall thin column), cube (medium-dark gray), incline (dark gray wedge/ramp), cuboid (light gray, rectangular prism)
composition.anchorRole: Generate base-scene first. Pass anchorFile as image_paths for every composition thumbnail so primitive shapes, materials, and studio stay consistent
composition.matchReference: Use the exact same grayscale primitive geometric solids — same sphere, cylinder, pyramid, rod, cube, incline, and cuboid — same matte hard-surface materials and dark charcoal studio from the reference image.
composition.framing: Eye-level camera, soft even studio lighting unless the concept requires tighter or wider crop
composition.forbidden: No text, no grid overlays, no drawn composition guides, no colored blocks, no people, no mannequins, no diagrams with labels

lighting.inherits: Global conventions (subject, facialFeatures, wardrobe, standardPose, noText, outputSpec, environment)
lighting.anchorRole: Reference for every lighting thumbnail. Pass anchorFile as image_paths so the mannequin, wardrobe, pose, and studio stay consistent.
lighting.matchReference: Use the exact same matte gray male mannequin, sculpted gray dress shirt, sculpted gray chino pants, belt, wardrobe, and neutral gray studio from the reference image.
lighting.framing: Medium shot waist-up constant across all lighting thumbnails — same as angles/eye-level.jpg framing
lighting.emphasis: The named lighting technique must be the primary visual subject. Other light sources should be as neutral as possible so the technique reads clearly.
lighting.forbidden: No text, no lighting diagrams, no arrows showing light positions, no multiple mannequins, no colored gels unless the concept is Gels

movements.inherits: Global conventions (subject, facialFeatures, wardrobe, noText, outputSpec, environment) — except standardPose which may vary to imply motion. Studio backdrop remains neutral gray.
movements.anchorRole: Reference for every movement thumbnail. Pass anchorFile as image_paths so the mannequin, wardrobe, and studio stay consistent. Some movement concepts may alter standardPose or add motion blur.
movements.matchReference: Use the exact same matte gray male mannequin, sculpted gray dress shirt, sculpted gray chino pants, belt, wardrobe, and neutral gray studio from the reference image.
movements.framing: Medium shot or wider depending on the movement concept — some require wider frame to suggest camera motion through space
movements.emphasis: Static image must read as implying the named camera movement through composition, motion blur, or perspective cues — not freeze-frame a moment in the movement
movements.forbidden: No text, no motion arrows, no diagrams, no multiple exposure trails of the mannequin, no drawn camera path lines, no video player UI

atmosphere.inherits: Global conventions (subject, facialFeatures, wardrobe, standardPose, noText, outputSpec) — environment lighting may vary to accommodate the atmospheric effect. Studio backdrop remains neutral gray but the atmosphere effect fills the space.
atmosphere.anchorRole: Reference for every atmosphere thumbnail. Pass anchorFile as image_paths so the mannequin, wardrobe, and studio stay consistent. Atmosphere effects are overlaid on this consistent scene.
atmosphere.matchReference: Use the exact same matte gray male mannequin, sculpted gray dress shirt, sculpted gray chino pants, belt, wardrobe, and neutral gray studio from the reference image.
atmosphere.framing: Medium shot waist-up constant — atmosphere effect fills the frame around and in front of the mannequin
atmosphere.emphasis: The atmospheric effect is the primary subject — large-scale, filling the environment around and interacting with the mannequin. Mannequin remains in standardPose, passive to the atmosphere.
atmosphere.forbidden: No text, no weather icons, no diagrams, no fantasy elements beyond the named effect

subjectCounts.inherits: Global conventions (subject, facialFeatures, wardrobe, standardPose, noText, outputSpec, environment)
subjectCounts.anchorRole: Generate one-shot (1S) first from male MS master. Pass anchorFile as image_paths for two-shot and three-shot so mannequin identity and studio stay consistent.
subjectCounts.matchReference: Use the exact same matte gray mannequin identity, sculpted gray wardrobe, neutral gray studio, and cinematic 35mm lens look from the reference image.
subjectCounts.framing: Medium shot waist up for 1S, 2S, and 3S. Medium wide knees-up for group. Long shot for crowd.
subjectCounts.emphasis: The number of distinct mannequin subjects in frame is the primary visual subject — each subject clearly separated, facing camera, standardPose.
subjectCounts.femaleMannequin: Matte gray female display mannequin with sculpted facial features, clean bob hairstyle, sculpted blouse with collar, sculpted skirt — unified gray hard-surface sculpt matching male mannequin material.
subjectCounts.forbidden: No text, no labels, no diagrams, no realistic humans, no overlapping subjects that read as one person, no action poses

coverage.inherits: Global conventions (subject, facialFeatures, wardrobe, standardPose, noText, outputSpec, environment)
coverage.anchorRole: Generate clean single first from male MS master. Use OTS cutout master for OTS; other coverage types edit from clean or MS master.
coverage.matchReference: Use the exact same matte gray male mannequin identity, sculpted gray dress shirt, belt, neutral gray studio, and cinematic 35mm lens look from the reference image.
coverage.framing: Medium shot waist up for all coverage types unless POV requires subjective camera position.
coverage.emphasis: The coverage relationship between camera, foreground obstructions, and on-camera subject is the primary visual subject.
coverage.otsSubject: Foreground mannequin: back/shoulder only in sculpted gray dress shirt, soft blur. Facing-camera subject: second distinct matte gray male mannequin, standardPose, facing camera.
coverage.forbidden: No text, no labels, no diagrams, no realistic humans, no action poses

samples.prompt: Use the exact same matte gray male mannequin face and side-parted hair from the reference image. Pure photographic film-school reference still. Zero typography: no text, letters, words, numbers, captions, labels, watermarks, logos, signage, UI overlays. Matte gray male display mannequin. Smooth sculpted dress shirt with collar and button placket, sculpted chino pants, sculpted belt with visible buckle — all same matte gray hard-surface material as body, unified gray sculpt, smooth surfaces with minimal folds only, no fabric wrinkles, no cloth texture. Neutral standing pose, facing camera, arms at sides. Neutral gray studio, dark desaturated palette, cinematic 35mm lens. Medium shot waist up: belt clearly visible at waist, top of chino pants visible, clear MS demonstration. Canonical mannequin identity plate.

Use the exact same matte gray male mannequin identity from the reference image — SAME face sculpt, SAME side-parted combed hair, SAME brow, nose, lips, chin. Do NOT make bald. Keep the side-parted hairstyle visible. Pure photographic film-school reference still. Zero typography: no text, letters, words, numbers, captions, labels, watermarks, logos, signage, UI overlays. Neutral gray studio, dark desaturated palette, cinematic 35mm lens. True close-up framing ONLY: face and hair fill frame from top of hair to chin, tight portrait crop — no torso, no chest. At most tiny sliver of sculpted gray shirt collar at bottom edge. Clear CU demonstration.

Use the exact same matte gray male mannequin identity — same face sculpt, brow, nose bridge, and eye shape — from the reference image. Pure photographic film-school reference still. Zero typography anywhere: no text, no letters, no words, no numbers, no captions, no labels, no watermarks, no logos, no signage, no UI overlays. Same gray hard-surface sculpt material throughout. Neutral gray seamless studio, dark desaturated palette, cinematic macro lens, muted tones. True extreme close-up ONLY: both eyes and brow fill the entire frame, cropped extremely tight. Frame cuts off above hairline and below nose bridge. Absolutely no shirt, no collar, no clothing, no fabric, nothing in foreground blocking the face. Face surface and eyes only. Clear ECU demonstration.

Use the exact same matte gray male mannequin identity — same face sculpt, side-parted hair — from the reference image. Pure photographic film-school reference still. Zero typography: no text, letters, words, numbers, captions, labels, watermarks, logos, signage, UI overlays. Medium close-up chest up, arms at sides. Shirt is smooth hard-surface gray sculpt like the mannequin body — flat matte planes on chest and sleeves, almost no folds, no fabric wrinkles, no cloth texture, no realistic shirt creases. Collar and button placket sculpted. Clear MCU demonstration.

Use the exact same matte gray male mannequin identity from the reference. Pure photographic film-school reference still. Zero typography: no text, letters, words, numbers, captions, labels, watermarks, logos, signage, UI overlays. Facing camera, arms at sides. Smooth sculpted gray dress shirt, belt at waist — hard-surface gray sculpt. Neutral gray studio, cinematic 35mm lens. Medium shot waist up ONLY: bottom edge cuts exactly at belt line — NO trousers visible below belt, NO thighs. Frame ends at waist. Clear MS demonstration.

Use the exact same matte gray male mannequin identity from the reference — frontal pose facing camera, head straight, eyes at camera. Film-school reference still, no text. Smooth sculpted gray dress shirt, chino pants, belt with buckle — hard-surface gray sculpt, minimal folds. Neutral gray studio, cinematic 35mm lens. Medium long shot / 3/4 shot (MLS): framed from thighs up. Bottom edge at upper thigh or knees — full thighs visible, balances subject and setting. Wider than cowboy mid-thigh crop. No shins, no feet. Clear MLS demonstration.

Use the exact same matte gray male mannequin identity from the reference — same frontal pose, lighting, studio, smooth sculpted gray dress shirt and chino pants, belt with buckle. Film-school reference still, no text. No holster, no gun, no western props. Cowboy shot: identical to MLS medium long shot but frame extends further down — bottom edge cuts at mid-thigh. No knees, no shins, no feet. Clear cowboy shot demonstration.

Pure photographic film-school reference still. Zero typography: no text, letters, words, numbers, captions, labels, watermarks, logos, signage, UI overlays. Matte gray male display mannequin with sculpted face, side-parted hair, facing camera, arms at sides. Smooth sculpted gray dress shirt, chino pants, belt, dress shoes — unified gray hard-surface sculpt. Neutral gray studio. Full shot (FS): camera close enough that entire standing body head to toe fills 90% of frame height. Tiny headroom, tiny footroom — shoes near bottom edge, hair near top edge. NOT small figure in large empty room. Clear full shot demonstration.

Match the full-length standing matte gray male mannequin in sculpted gray dress shirt, sculpted gray chino pants, belt, and shoes from the reference. Pure photographic film-school reference still. Zero typography: no text, letters, words, numbers, captions, labels, watermarks, logos, signage, UI overlays. Neutral gray studio, dark desaturated palette, cinematic 35mm lens. Extreme long shot: same full standing mannequin tiny in vast empty gray studio, arms at sides, not a bust on floor, clear ELS demonstration.

Use the exact same matte gray male mannequin identity from the reference. Pure photographic film-school reference still. Zero typography: no text, letters, words, numbers, captions, labels, watermarks, logos, signage, UI overlays. Facing camera, arms at sides. Smooth sculpted gray dress shirt, chino pants, belt with visible buckle — hard-surface gray sculpt, minimal folds, no fabric wrinkles. Neutral gray studio, cinematic 35mm lens. Medium shot waist up. Eye-level camera, level horizon, straight-on, clear eye-level demonstration.

Pure photographic film-school reference still. Zero typography anywhere: no text, no letters, no words, no numbers, no captions, no labels, no watermarks, no logos, no signage, no UI overlays. Neutral gray studio, dark desaturated palette, cinematic 35mm lens, muted tones. Over-the-shoulder angle: foreground back and shoulder of first matte gray male mannequin in sculpted gray dress shirt, soft blur. Use the exact same matte gray male mannequin, sculpted gray dress shirt, sculpted gray chino pants, belt, wardrobe, pose, and neutral gray studio from the reference image. No realistic human skin. Dark desaturated palette, cinematic 35mm lens, muted tones. Point-of-view: subjective first-person view looking at mannequin face and sculpted gray dress shirt in medium shot waist up, subject arms at sides, clear POV demonstration.

Pure photographic film-school reference still. Zero typography anywhere: no text, no letters, no words, no numbers, no captions, no labels, no watermarks, no logos, no signage, no UI overlays, no drawn grid lines on image. Minimal grayscale primitive geometric solid set on dark charcoal seamless studio floor and backdrop. Exact primitive vocabulary: one sphere (medium gray), one cylinder (light gray), one pyramid (dark gray), one rod (light gray, tall thin column), one cube (medium-dark gray), one incline (dark gray wedge/ramp), one cuboid (light gray, rectangular prism). All matte hard-surface geometric solids, no color, no people, no mannequins. Soft even studio lighting, eye-level camera, medium shot showing full primitive set with room around them. Neutral establishing layout for composition teaching.

Use the exact same grayscale primitive geometric solids — same sphere, cylinder, pyramid, rod, cube, incline, and cuboid — same matte hard-surface materials and dark charcoal studio from the reference image. Pure photographic film-school reference still. Zero typography: no text, letters, words, numbers, captions, labels, watermarks, logos, signage, UI overlays, no drawn grid lines. Rule of thirds composition: cuboid placed at left third vertical line and upper third horizontal intersection, supporting primitives arranged naturally. Clear rule of thirds demonstration.

Use the exact same grayscale primitive geometric solids — same sphere, cylinder, pyramid, rod, cube, incline, and cuboid — same matte hard-surface materials and dark charcoal studio from the reference image. Centered composition: cuboid directly centered in frame, other primitives balanced symmetrically around center. Clear centered composition demonstration.
